title: Iran’s Joint Air Defense Command announced that an F-15 fighter jet was targeted...
description: Iran’s Joint Air Defense Command announced that an F-15 fighter jet was targeted with a surface-to-air missile in the airspace near Hormuz Island along the country’s southern coast after being detected and tracked by defense systems. The fate of the aircraft is still under investigation. Reports قناة الميادين - Al Mayadeen Tv
